children.name:
AssertionError: poolMetric.nav (20046225) != valueManaged (19548626)
assert 20046225 == 19548626
 +  where 20046225 = int('20046225')
 +    where '20046225' = PoolMetric(nav='20046225', blockNumber=446247734, totalSupply='19641695', tokenPrice=1.0203, customers=11, deposits='18554924', date='2026-03-27T16:15:00.000Z').nav
Pool financials are consistent: valueManaged = totalDeposited + revenue
